Through its official Amazon storefront, Baseus is currently offering returning and new low prices on the X1 Pro Dual-Tracking Wireless Outdoor Solar Security Camera starting at $149.99 shipped, or you can score its bundle with a 32GB microSD card for $157.49 shipped. The standalone camera has been mostly keeping down between $170 and $160 recently from its full $270 pricing (with occasional falls to the $150 low), while the micoSD card bundle has been slowly cascading down from its $280 rate since April, having previously only gone as low as $175. Now, you’re looking at a return $120 markdown on the camera and a $123 markdown on the bundle for the best prices we have tracked since hitting the market at the top of the year.
